feishuOnboardHint: Scan the QR code with Feishu to automatically create and bind a Bot.
welcomeWorkflowHint: Start from runtime context, then resume or create a session.
skipPermissionDesc: Skip permission prompts for tool calls
sessionsSubtitle: Browse all conversations by time and resume a session when needed.
artifactsSubtitle: Images, files, and links found in recent assistant and tool outputs.
workspaceOpenSession: Switch to this session to show its history snapshot
stepNewSession: Start a session and send a message
messagePlaceholder: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
integrationsSubtitle: Manage MCP servers and custom agents from one workspace.
messageGatewaySubtitle: Connect Feishu, WeChat, and other chat platforms to dedicated Claude Code sessions from one entry point.
gatewayNoPlatformConfigured: No platform has complete required parameters yet.
gatewayOverallDisabled: Required parameters are saved. Enable the platform when ready.
gatewayOverallEnabled: At least one platform is enabled and ready to receive messages.
gatewayConfiguredDisabledHint: Required parameters are saved. Turn on message receiving and save when ready.
gatewayAdvancedSettingsHint: Event subscription, allowlist, and runtime behavior.
gatewayNoRequiredFieldsYet: Required fields will appear when supported.
feishuPlatformDescription: Receive Feishu app messages and reply in the original conversation.
wechatPlatformDescription: Reserved for future WeChat message access.
feishuRequiredParamsHint: Only App ID and App Secret are required in the main flow.
feishuGatewaySubtitle: Open Feishu, scan to connect message receiving, and keep advanced setup below.
feishuGatewayRoute: Feishu messages → Claude Code → Feishu replies
feishuGatewayDisabledHint: Open Feishu and scan the code, then enable message receiving.
feishuGatewayEnabledHint: Message receiving is on. Feishu messages can now reach Claude Code.
feishuGatewayScanHint: Scan with Feishu to open the event subscription URL. Paste this URL in your Feishu app's event subscription settings.
feishuGatewayManualConfigHint: Use this only when scan connection is unavailable.
feishuGatewayStepCreateApp: Create or open a Feishu bot app.
feishuGatewayStepCopyUrl: Copy this Event URL into Feishu Event Subscriptions.
feishuGatewayStepEnable: Save credentials below, then enable message receiving.
feishuGatewayAdvancedHint: Required only when first connecting the bot.
feishuGatewayConfigHint: Set the Feishu app credentials, event URL, allowlists, and busy behavior.
feishuAllowedUsersPlaceholder: One open_id or user_id per line
feishuGatewayScopesHint: Each Feishu chat keeps its own Claude Code session until reset.
feishuGatewayLoadFailed: Failed to load Feishu gateway config
feishuGatewayScopesLoadFailed: Failed to load Feishu gateway sessions
feishuGatewaySaveFailed: Failed to save Feishu gateway config: {message}
feishuQrcodeUnavailable: QR code library not installed (offline/intranet), use manual config below.
feishuConfirmResetScope: Reset Feishu scope "{scope}"? The next message will start a new Claude Code session.
mcpSectionSubtitle: Connect external tools and data sources for Claude Code.
agentsSectionSubtitle: Create focused subagents with their own model, tools, and prompt.
mcpFormSubtitle: Choose how this server is launched or reached.
newFolderNeedDir: Enter a directory before creating a folder
fileSearchPlaceholder: Search files or folders in this directory and subdirectories
chooseClientHint: Choose files from this device. They will be uploaded to the server before sending.
chooseLocalHint: This browser is on the server machine. Choose local files or browse the workspace.
interrupted: Interrupted. You can continue with more input
persistentCliFallback: Persistent CLI is unavailable; switched to one-shot mode
cliNoOutput: CLI returned no output. Check configuration and API key.
persistentCliExited: Persistent CLI exited; the next message will use one-shot mode
liveInputUnavailable: Live follow-up input is unavailable for this session
searchNeedConcreteDir: Choose a concrete directory before searching
folderAlreadyExists: A folder with this name already exists
forbidden: Access to this file is forbidden
unsupported_type: This file type cannot be previewed
contextRecallTimeout: Auto context recall timed out; skipped injection to avoid blocking send
contextRecallFailed: Auto context recall failed; skipped injection: {message}
cwdChangePrompt:
The current working directory no longer exists. Would you like to specify a new one?

You can also right-click the session in the list and select "Change working directory".
stoppedEditable: Session stopped. You can edit cwd/model and click + New Session
skillsSubtitle: Manage installed skills and inspect their SKILL.md definitions.
toolsSubtitle: Review and control the tools agents can use, including Claude built-ins and custom extensions.
confirmUninstallSkill: Uninstall skill "{name}"? This deletes the local skill directory.
restored: Session restored · send a message to continue
tooManyResults: Many results; showing the first 200 only
cliInstallDesc: No CLI tool was detected. Install Claude Code with npm (requires Node.js 18+):
cliInstallHint: Run the command in a terminal, or click the button below to install automatically.
cmdCopyFailed: Copy failed; select and copy manually
cliInstalling: Installing, please wait... (may take a few minutes)
cliInstallFailed: Install failed. Run the command in a terminal to see details
cliInstallNpmMissing: npm was not detected. Install Node.js 18+ first
cliInstallInProgress: An install task is already running
cliInstallTimeout: Install timed out. Check the network or install manually
cliInstallNotDetected: Install command ran, but no CLI was detected. Restart the server and retry
notifyWhenUnfocused: Notify when work completes while unfocused
allowLanAccess: Allow devices outside localhost to access this GUI
lanAccessEnabled: LAN devices can access this GUI
notifyPermissionDenied: Notifications are not enabled; allow them in browser permissions
contextSettingsSaveFailed: Failed to save automatic memory context settings
notifyUnsupported: This browser does not support notifications
confirmDeleteSession: Delete session "{title}"? This permanently deletes the local session record and cannot be undone.
agentToolsHelp: Select the tools this agent can use. Disabled tools will not appear here.
memorySubtitle: Browse, search, and edit the memory files available to Claude Code.
memoryActionsSubtitle: Create a note manually or ask Claude to summarize the current project context.
memoryOrganizeSummary: LLM suggested {count} action(s) · added {linked} link pair(s) · model {model}
memoryOrganizingDesc: Adding Wiki links and asking the LLM for organize suggestions.
memoryOrganizeApplied: Memory organize applied: {merged} merged, {refined} refined, {deleted} deleted, {rewritten} rewritten
memoryOrganizeApplyPartial: Some organize actions failed. See details.
memoryOrganizeApplyFailed: Failed to apply memory organize actions
artifactsEmptyHint: Start a conversation and Claude will automatically generate artifacts from tool results and files.
setCwdFirst: Please set a working directory first.
memoryAutoConsolidateDesc: Auto-extract durable memories after each turn
remoteDiagHint: Use SSH in read-only / read-write mode against a remote target
remoteKeyHint: Fill the key path above, or paste the private key here.
remoteKeySaved: Key saved. Leave empty to keep it; paste a new one to replace.
remotePasswordHint: The SSH user's login password. Uses the system ssh client — no extra dependency.
remotePasswordSaved: Password saved. Leave empty to keep it.
remoteNoteUsage: Pick a remote target under runtime settings before starting a session. Claude Code CLI still runs locally; the agent operates on that target through SSH tools.
remoteNoteReadonly: Default is read-only mode (logs, status, sysinfo). Enable "Allow remote writes" to let the agent run changing commands; every remote command is written to ~/.ccb/remote_audit.log.
remoteNotePrereq: The target only needs an SSH server. Use key-based auth and a least-privilege account; restrict its sshd to this machine.
remoteNoTargets: No remote targets yet. Click below to add one.
remoteSshMissing: No SSH client found (Windows requires OpenSSH or WSL)
remoteSshMissingWin: On Windows, install OpenSSH from Settings or use SSH from WSL. Key-based auth does not require this.
remoteKeyAuthUnaffected: Note: Key-based auth works regardless. This notice only affects password login.
profileNamePrompt: Enter a name for this profile:
profileSaveHint: Enter a new name, or click an existing profile to overwrite it with the current editor content.
pasteJsonError: Invalid JSON. Please paste a valid JSON object.
pasteJsonApplied: Applied to editor. Click Save to persist.
updateRestartManual: Update done. Please restart the server manually.
updateRestartNeeded: Code has been updated locally. Restart the server to use the new version.
updateConfirm: New version {version} is available. Start update?
filePreviewSelectHint: Click lines to select, Shift+click for range
mcpInvalidEnv: Env must be a JSON object
workspaceFilesHint: Browse workspace files and attach them to the message
workspaceReviewHint: Review the current working directory's Git branch and file changes
viewingSession: Viewing live session from another client (read-only)
sessionTaken: Session taken over by another client, switching to viewer mode
scheduledTasksSubtitle: Run Claude Code prompts automatically on an interval, daily time, or one-off schedule.
scheduledPromptPlaceholder: Describe what Claude Code should do automatically...
feishuOnboardScanHint: Scan the QR code with Feishu app to create a Bot automatically.
memoryConsolidationSkipped: Auto memory skipped duplicate or low-value content
